message:
test(extensions): add Phase 2 fuzz tests for capability bypass, concurrent dispatch, and tool registration

Extension security fuzz tests (FUZZ-P1.9 Phase 2):

Proptest-based capability bypass:
- capability_deny_all_rejects_gated_calls (256 cases): verify that a
  deny-all policy (all 10 capabilities in deny list) rejects every
  capability-gated host call method (session, events, ui, tool, exec,
  http, log, fs) regardless of payload shape
- capability_per_extension_deny_overrides_allow (256 cases): verify
  that per-extension deny rules override a globally permissive policy,
  ensuring extension-specific sandboxing cannot be bypassed

Proptest-based concurrent dispatch:
- concurrent_dispatch_same_manager_safe (3-8 ops × 3-8 payloads):
  rapid-fire interleaved dispatches to the same ExtensionManager for
  both event and session host calls must not panic or corrupt state

Proptest-based tool registration:
- extension_tool_def_malformed_never_panics: register extensions with
  fuzzed name/description/inputSchema and verify getAllTools dispatch
  doesn't panic, even with empty strings, control characters, or
  deeply nested JSON schemas

Deterministic coverage tests:
- capability_deny_all_covers_all_methods: non-proptest variant that
  iterates all 8 known capability methods under deny-all policy for
  deterministic CI coverage
- concurrent_session_state_interleaved: 20 rapid set_name/set_model
  cycles verify final state consistency (session-19, prov-19/model-19)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
